narrative_lines.text: Onto2AI Modeller is an AI assistant for building and reviewing industry-grade data models.
narrative_lines.notes: 5-second introduction defining what Onto2AI Modeller is.

narrative_lines.text: Now we launch Onto2AI Modeller by typing the command: onto2ai-modeller --model gpt --host localhost --port 8180. This starts the local Modeller service on port 8180, so we can open it in the browser and continue model review.
Click http://localhost:8180, and show Onto2AI Modeller UI.
narrative_lines.notes: Open local URL and reveal the Modeller interface.

narrative_lines.text: Click CLASSES and RELATIONSHIPS. We can review the number of classes, relationships, individuals, datatypes, and class hierarchy in the staging area under your review.
narrative_lines.notes: Overview of staging metrics and hierarchy via classes/relationships panels.

narrative_lines.text: Click CLASSES to expand, then click to review the W-2 form class. Then we will see this class, all datatypes, related classes, and all relationships.
narrative_lines.notes: Navigate to W-2 class and inspect its full schema context.

narrative_lines.text: Now click UML DIAGRAM, you will see the same model render as UML diagram.
narrative_lines.notes: Final transition to UML Diagram view.

scenes.visual: Expand classes and select W-2 form

tts.instructions: Voice Affect: Warm and composed. Tone: Professional and clear. Pacing: Steady.
